rag_rules: Preserve existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Use assign only for implementation outputs or auxiliary variables in implementation contracts
Do not use subcomponent paths in component type contracts
Do not invent declarations for unresolved references; use existing visible identifiers
generic_rules: Maintain architectural integrity when modifying AADL models
Scope AGREE contracts appropriately for component types and implementations
Validate all generated AGREE clauses against visible identifiers
Avoid mixing AADL properties and AGREE expressions
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Component type annexes for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantees in implementation scopes
Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE expressions without explicit ports/constants
irrelevant_topics: AADL timing properties in AGREE expressions
